title: Landon Pumpkin
description: A stupid mod designed for friends that adds a pumpkin that makes noises
body:
A really stupid mod I made that adds a bunch of things relatable to a dumb pumpkin image that my friends started worshipping.

Includes but not limited to \
Landon \
Landon Door \
Landon Pumpkin \
Blue Landon \
Yellow Landon \
Light Blue Landon \
Radiation Landon \
Evil Landon \
And much more in the future
